archimate:DataObject.name: ODP
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: OntologyDesignPatterns.org is a Semantic Web portal dedicated to ontology design patterns (ODPs)
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: Association for Ontology Design & Patterns (ODPA)
Source: http://ontologydesignpatterns.org/wiki/Main_Page
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Ontology Catalogue
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ODPDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ODPDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/OntologiesCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: OntologyDesignPatterns.org is a Semantic Web portal dedicated to ontology design patterns (ODPs)
